PowerShell(Start-Process python -ArgumentList "-m", "runtime.app" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\FURSYS\\Desktop\\aouribot\\aouri-bot" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8787/demo" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode; Write-Output "HTTP $r" } catch { Write-Output "DOWN: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8787/api/health" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\): $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8787/internal_demo" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { Write-Output "HTTP $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Output "Error: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8787/" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; Write-Output "HTTP $code - server is running" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8787" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8787/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object StatusCode } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" }; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\FURSYS\\Desktop\\aouribot\\aouri-bot\\server_stderr.log" -Tail 20)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8787/admin" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Admin Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Admin Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8787/upload" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Upload Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Upload Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
